title: AI Settings
description: Tune workspace-level agent behavior and watch shadow parity before promotion.
restrictedDescription: Only workspace owners and admins can change ingestion agent settings.

errors.shadowParityNotPassed: Shadow parity has not passed yet.
errors.integerRange: {{field}} must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
errors.percentRange: {{field}} must be a number between 0 and 100.

workspaceMode.title: Workspace mode
workspaceMode.description: Classic owns production until shadow parity is acceptable.

dailyTokenCap.title: Daily token cap
dailyTokenCap.description: Agent plan calls stop once the workspace reaches the cap.

parity.title: Promotion criteria (experimental)
parity.description: Adjust the validation strength required before AI can switch to production mode.
parity.warning: Lowering these values can auto-apply AI decisions that have not been sufficiently validated. Use only in experiment or test workspaces. Leave blank to use system defaults (7 days / 20 items / 90% / 85%).
parity.observedDaysHelp: How many days to observe before promotion review (default 7 days, between 1 and 30).
parity.comparableCountHelp: How many ingestion decisions to compare before promotion (default 20, between 1 and 1000).
parity.actionAgreementHelp: The rate where AI and the classic classifier choose the same action type (create/update/append, etc.; default 90%).
parity.targetAgreementHelp: The rate where AI and the classic classifier choose the same target page (default 85%).

scheduledAgent.title: Scheduled Agent
scheduledAgent.description: Let the agent reorganize selected wiki areas on demand or on a schedule.

help.enabled: Allow manual and cron-based scheduled reorganize runs.
help.autoApply: Scheduled Agent bypasses the approval queue; use scope and token caps as guardrails.
help.destructiveTools: When enabled, Scheduled Agent can auto-apply page deletes and merges.
help.dailyTokenCap: Optional override. Values of 10,000 or more are recommended.

modelRouting.title: Model routing
modelRouting.description: Provider, fast model, large-context model, and threshold.

instructions.title: Agent instructions
instructions.description: Prepended to every explore and plan turn for this workspace.
instructions.placeholder:
Engineering RFCs always live under /docs/engineering/rfcs/.
Slack #incidents sources update existing incident pages; do not create new ones.
"PdM" means product manager.

shadowParity.title: Shadow parity
shadowParity.description: Agreement compares the latest agent plan to classic decisions.

reason.passed: Shadow parity meets the promotion threshold.
reason.blocked: Shadow parity is below the promotion threshold.
reason.collecting: Shadow parity is still collecting enough comparison data.
reason.not_started: Shadow parity has not collected comparable ingestions yet.
